overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a female character walking through a sunny urban waterfront district resembling Miami's Brickell area. The character traverses a concrete promenade, transitions through dense tropical vegetation, and explores an open parking plaza surrounded by modern skyscrapers before returning to the waterfront edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete waterfront promenade with bay views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete waterfront promenade with the bay to the right and a scaffolded building to the left

entered.detail: tall building covered in green construction netting and scaffolding
calm blue-green water of the bay extending to the horizon
cluster of high-rise buildings visible across the water
wide concrete walkway with geometric patterns along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny waterfront promenade with clear blue skies. To the left stands a tall building wrapped in green construction scaffolding, while the calm bay water stretches to the right with a distant city skyline visible across the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetated ramp between waterfront and upper plaza

events.description: character turns left away from waterfront and enters densely vegetated area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking up a concrete ramp through dense tropical vegetation and palm trees

entered.detail: dense green bushes and plants lining the path
tall palm trees with large fronds creating shade overhead
sloped concrete pathway leading upward away from the water

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a concrete ramp leading away from the waterfront into a narrow, vegetated corridor. Dense tropical plants and palm trees line both sides of the path, partially obscuring the sky and creating dappled shade as the character moves between the waterfront and the upper urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking plaza surrounded by skyscrapers

events.description: exits vegetation into large open parking lot with tall modern buildings surrounding the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty parking lot and looking around at the surrounding high-rise buildings and skyline

entered.detail: expansive asphalt parking area with white painted line markings
tall dark glass office tower with reflective windows
tall residential building with beige and orange facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the vegetation, the character enters a vast, empty parking plaza surrounded by towering modern skyscrapers. The character explores the open asphalt area, walking between a beige residential tower and a dark glass office building while the bright sun casts sharp shadows across the lot.

events.description: approaching the waterfront edge of the parking lot with view of the bay reopening
character pauses to look out at the water and distant skyline before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along the parking lot edge overlooking the bay, pausing to observe the distant skyline and water

entered.detail: low concrete barrier separating the parking area from the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the edge of the parking lot where it meets the waterfront, with the bay and distant city skyline visible again to the right. The character pauses to look out over the water, with the beige apartment tower now prominent on the left and the concrete seawall defining the boundary between the asphalt and the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright waterfront promenade through a lush tropical corridor and into a stark, modern urban plaza. It begins with the character walking along a sunny concrete path between a building wrapped in green scaffolding and the calm waters of a bay. As the character turns left, the scene shifts from the open coastline into a narrow, shaded corridor where dense tropical plants and palm trees partially obscure the blue sky. The camera then emerges from the vegetation into a vast, empty asphalt parking plaza, moving between a beige residential tower and a dark glass office building under the harsh glare of the sun. Finally, the path leads back toward the waterfront edge, where the character pauses by a concrete seawall to look out over the bay and the distant city skyline.
